name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you tried other approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context
Any screenshots, links, or references that would help explain the request.

## Target Audience
- [ ] Amateur radio operator (digital modes)
- [ ] IoT / Arduino hobbyist
- [ ] IT professional / USB serial console user
- [ ] Other: ___
